series_metadata.series_description: Employee personnel folders containing employee applications; personnel action's (e.g., promotions, reclassifications, etc.). Includes: Position description, litigation or Board of Review appeals records, misc. (e.g., training, emergency contact, new hire documents, commendations, etc.). This series may contain Social Security numbers that must be redacted before being released.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven years employment ends or scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: seven years employment ends
